content: im curious how theyll do it if you dont own the awakener
Well that's kinda the whole point of a draft mode
It don't care who you have
then what would be the point of needing to own awakenerd to use them and the expensive bp giving access to all
Because it's random and can't properly team build
Also probably just a for fun mode and not actually influencing the ranking
The problem with draft mode if they put it full random pick
Is you can just remove all the units you don't want with the pyramid that reset units when it comes
So you have less units to rng with and can force the team you want

Cause they're based

You don't have limited units + wheels = shafted
Not win, play

To win it's a different scenario
draft used to have entry fee and prizes depending on result. i won max wins many many times. there was a leaderboard for it.
the prize was mostly cosmetic currency. it didn't power me up much for regular mode
I guess only way to see what they'll do is to wait

How can I improve this?
Tawil combos really well with rewinding time. I would say if you're going to use tawil, you need somebody on the team to ultimate every turn using rewinding time.

Ogier is my favorite tank at the moment and I've really been loving Poetic Bygone Days on him to just spam his charge as much as I can. Critical Point is super strong especially with ogier on the team. 4 charged up strikes on a vulnerable target is 100 damage.
it also amplifies the damage and shielding of ogiers ultimate
if you're wanting to use helot, maybe stick her in the front so she gets hurt more.

ever since then, I am more aware of such events and don't reset prematurely
